author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Styx: Blades of Greed - New Game+ Update Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/EP6665-PPSA28835_00-STYX300000000000

Today's update introduces New Game+, giving you a brand-new reason to return to the shadows.

After defeating the final boss, you'll unlock New Game+, allowing you to start a fresh adventure while keeping much of your hard-earned progression and experiment with new approaches throughout every mission.

Styx: Blades of Greed is out now on PlayStation®5.

#ps5 #ps5games #styxbladesofgreed

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Additional Side Story: Rudy Launch Trailer | PS5
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/monster-hunter-stories-3-twisted-reflection/

Reports of his demise were greatly eggsaggerated. 🥚
 
Navirou, the Felyne hero who once saved the world, makes a mighty return in the Additional Side Story: Rudy paid DLC for Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection.
 
Available June 25 on PS5!

Download the free Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection demo and carry your save data over to the full game.

#ps5 #ps5games #MHStories3 #MonsterHunter
